mapper.sql: asset_id, subcategory_id, seller_id, title, price, summary, description, youtube_url, create_date, view_count
mapper.insert: insert into asset(subcategory_id, seller_id, title, price, summary, description, youtube_url) values(#{subcategory_id}, #{seller_id}, #{title}, #{price}, #{summary}, #{description}, #{youtube_url})
